title: B0: Bare-Metal GPIO Control Bring-up
description:
**Context:** Automotive

**Spec:** Configure the base registers for a GPIO Control to achieve basic functionality in an Automotive system.

**Constraints:** Follow best practices for Automotive industry standards.

**Acceptance Criteria:** The simulator will verify the performance metrics.
starter_code:
// Starter code for GPIO Control - B0: Bare-Metal GPIO Control Bring-up
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_GPIO_CONTROL_INIT=OK>

title: I1: Interrupt-Driven GPIO Control Architecture
description:
**Context:** Aerospace

**Spec:** Migrate the GPIO Control from polling to an interrupt-driven state machine for Aerospace.

**Constraints:** Do not block the main CPU loop.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Interrupt fires and clears properly.
starter_code:
// Starter code for GPIO Control - I1: Interrupt-Driven GPIO Control Architecture
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_GPIO_CONTROL_IRQ_HANDLED=100>

title: I2: Debugging GPIO Control Edge Cases
description:
**Context:** Consumer IoT

**Spec:** You are provided a broken implementation of GPIO Control in a Consumer IoT device. Intermittent failures occur.

**Constraints:** Identify race conditions or unhandled interrupts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** The system recovers from fault injections.
starter_code:
// Starter code for GPIO Control - I2: Debugging GPIO Control Edge Cases
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_GPIO_CONTROL_RECOVERY_TIME<1ms>

title: A1: Highly Optimized GPIO Control
description:
**Context:** Medical Devices

**Spec:** Rearchitect the GPIO Control to utilize DMA transfers and Deep Sleep in Medical Devices.

**Constraints:** CPU must remain in deep sleep during data transfer.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Overall CPU load drops below 5%.
starter_code:
// Starter code for GPIO Control - A1: Highly Optimized GPIO Control
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_GPIO_CONTROL_CPU_LOAD<5PCT>

title: INT: Fault-Tolerant GPIO Control System
description:
**Context:** Industrial Automation

**Spec:** Design a high-reliability GPIO Control architecture for a safety-critical Industrial Automation application.

**Constraints:** Must handle hardware resets without state loss.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Passes all SIL-2 safety unit tests.
starter_code:
// Starter code for GPIO Control - INT: Fault-Tolerant GPIO Control System
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_GPIO_CONTROL_FAULT_RECOVERY=SAFE>

title: A1: DMA-Backed UART Rx with Idle Line Detection
description:
**Context:** Medical Devices

**Spec:** Configure the UART peripheral to use circular DMA for reception, utilizing the IDLE line interrupt to process variable-length packets.

**Constraints:** CPU overhead must be exactly 0% during byte reception. CPU should only wake up on the IDLE line interrupt.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Receive 12, 64, and 128 byte packets consecutively without dropping bytes or triggering framing errors.

// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_DMA_IDLE_RX=PASS>

title: I2: Priority Inversion Debugging
description:
**Context:** Consumer IoT

**Spec:** A low priority task holds the mutex while a medium priority task preempts it, blocking a high priority task. Fix the priority inversion.

**Constraints:** Do not modify task priorities manually. You must configure the RTOS primitives correctly.

**Acceptance Criteria:** The high priority task must execute within 10 ticks of requesting the resource, demonstrating priority inheritance.
starter_code:
// Starter code for FreeRTOS Mutex - I2: Priority Inversion Debugging
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_PRIORITY_INHERITANCE=PASS>

**Context:** Consumer IoT

**Spec:** Implement sensorless commutation by detecting the back-EMF zero-crossing point using the MCU's internal ADCs.

**Constraints:** ADC conversions must be triggered by the PWM timer to avoid switching noise (center-aligned PWM).

**Acceptance Criteria:** Commutation must occur exactly 30 electrical degrees after the detected zero-crossing event.

// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_ZCD_ACCURACY<2DEG>

**Constraints:** Loop filter capacitor must not exceed 100pF to save silicon area. Charge pump current is fixed at 50uA.

// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_AND_OR_NOT_LOGIC_RTL_LATCH_FREE=1>

title: I1: Parameterized AND/OR/NOT Logic
description:
**Context:** Aerospace

**Spec:** Convert the AND/OR/NOT Logic to a parameterized module (N-bits).

**Constraints:** Use Verilog parameters or SystemVerilog interfaces.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Simulates correctly for N=8, N=16, N=32.

description:
**Context:** Consumer IoT

**Spec:** The AND/OR/NOT Logic fails timing simulation. Fix the critical path.

**Constraints:** Do not alter the clock frequency.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Worst Negative Slack (WNS) is >= 0.
starter_code:
// Starter code for AND/OR/NOT Logic - I2: Debugging Setup/Hold
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_AND_OR_NOT_LOGIC_WNS>=0>

title: A1: Clock Domain Crossing (CDC)
description:
**Context:** Medical Devices

**Spec:** The AND/OR/NOT Logic must interface between two clock domains in Medical Devices.

**Constraints:** Use multi-flop synchronizers or async FIFOs.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Passes 0-in CDC verification checks.
starter_code:
// Starter code for AND/OR/NOT Logic - A1: Clock Domain Crossing (CDC)
// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_AND_OR_NOT_LOGIC_CDC_VIOLATIONS=0>

title: INT: Power-Optimized Architecture
description:
**Context:** Industrial Automation

**Spec:** Design the AND/OR/NOT Logic for an ultra-low-power Industrial Automation ASIC.

**Constraints:** Implement clock gating where appropriate.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Dynamic power simulation shows 40% reduction.

// <ACADMIX_ASSERT_AND_OR_NOT_LOGIC_PWR_DROP>40PCT>
